<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="skinGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#80b653" />
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#d8c84a" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#f6b24a" />
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="fleshGrad" cx="40%" cy="40%" r="70%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffefc6" />
      <stop offset="30%" stop-color="#ffb05c" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ff8a3b" />
    </radialGradient>
    <clipPath id="leftHalfClip">
      <!-- clip to create a flat cut on the right side of the left papaya -->
      <rect x="24" y="80" width="210" height="350" />
    </clipPath>
    <filter id="soft" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="1" />
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- left: sliced papaya half -->
  <g clip-path="url(#leftHalfClip)">
    <!-- outer skin -->
    <ellipse cx="170" cy="300" rx="140" ry="200" fill="url(#skinGrad)" stroke="#4a7a2b" stroke-width="6" />
    <!-- inner flesh (shifted to the right to suggest cavity) -->
    <ellipse cx="200" cy="300" rx="95" ry="160" fill="url(#fleshGrad)" stroke="#e48a3a" stroke-width="4" />
    <!-- inner rim (thin darker edge) -->
    <ellipse cx="200" cy="300" rx="100" ry="170" fill="none" stroke="#c96e2d" stroke-width="6" opacity="0.6" />

    <!-- seeds cluster -->
    <g fill="#151515" stroke="#0b0b0b" stroke-width="1">
      <ellipse cx="170" cy="265" rx="9" ry="12" transform="rotate(-15 170 265)" />
      <ellipse cx="186" cy="280" rx="8" ry="11" transform="rotate(-10 186 280)" />
      <ellipse cx="153" cy="290" rx="7" ry="10" transform="rotate(-20 153 290)" />
      <ellipse cx="180" cy="305" rx="9" ry="13" transform="rotate(8 180 305)" />
      <ellipse cx="165" cy="320" rx="8" ry="11" transform="rotate(-8 165 320)" />
      <ellipse cx="190" cy="335" rx="7" ry="10" transform="rotate(12 190 335)" />
      <ellipse cx="150" cy="310" rx="6" ry="9" transform="rotate(-25 150 310)" />
      <ellipse cx="205" cy="295" rx="7" ry="10" transform="rotate(18 205 295)" />
      <ellipse cx="175" cy="345" rx="6" ry="8" transform="rotate(6 175 345)" />
    </g>

    <!-- small highlights on seeds -->
    <g fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.9">
      <circle cx="168" cy="259" r="2" />
      <circle cx="183" cy="275" r="1.6" />
      <circle cx="179" cy="299" r="1.8" />
      <circle cx="193" cy="333" r="1.2" />
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- right: whole papaya -->
  <g>
    <ellipse cx="380" cy="210" rx="110" ry="160" fill="url(#skinGrad)" stroke="#41702c" stroke-width="6" />
    <!-- subtle highlight -->
    <ellipse cx="360" cy="170" rx="40" ry="70" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)" filter="url(#soft)" />
    <!-- small stem and leaf -->
    <path d="M330 120 C320 110, 300 120, 300 135 C305 128, 320 125, 330 130" fill="#5b8332" stroke="#3f5f22" stroke-width="3" />
    <path d="M345 115 C360 100, 380 100, 392 112 C380 108, 366 112, 345 115" fill="#6ea93a" stroke="#3f5f22" stroke-width="2" />
  </g>

  <!-- small ground shadow to anchor fruits -->
  <ellipse cx="220" cy="480" rx="140" ry="18" fill="rgba(0,0,0,0.12)" />
  <ellipse cx="380" cy="410" rx="100" ry="14" fill="rgba(0,0,0,0.10)" />
</svg>
